title: Partition DDL without UPDATE INDEXES — global indexes become UNUSABLE
expected_feedback: Standard: DROP PARTITION without the UPDATE INDEXES clause causes all global indexes on the partitioned table to become UNUSABLE. Any subsequent query that uses a global index path will fail with ORA-01502 (index or partition of such index is in unusable state). On a 100M-row table with multiple global indexes, this creates an immediate production outage. Fix: ALTER TABLE logs DROP PARTITION logs_2023_q1 UPDATE INDEXES; — this maintains global indexes inline during the partition drop, adding modest overhead but preventing index invalidation.
